calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Apr-16-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Anthony Agpaoa appearing for and with petitioner. Henry Trujillo is in court. Maria Trujillo is also in court. She stated she can not get any IDs. Court will review counsel's declaration after the end of the calendar. Matter submitted.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Aguerre.
At 10:25am, Court is granting the petition. Court is amending the order to show the parents and hospital have failed to register her birth without any reasons. Order signed.

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Mar-21-2007 Continued To Apr-16-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Anthony Agpaoa (Counsel for Maria Trujillo, Petitioner); Henry Trujillo (Interested Person, putative father of the Petitioner).

Mr. Aqpaoa advised the Court of the history of the matter, noting the anomolous birth circumstances. After further discussion, the Court requested that counsel and Mr. Trujillo evidence by declaration the history they recited in court, the efforts they have made to remedy the records discrepancies, and attach any records (including the Social Security Administration records) reflecting the afore-described history and efforts. The matter was continued to April 16, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 to allow counsel sufficient time to prepare and file the requested pleadings.

Judicial Officer: Commissioner Dorothy L. McMath; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722; Court Investigator: None; Bailiff: Deputy Loos; Clerk: R. Michael Diles.
